'''âch-zh-f''' ('''shachazhaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:myocardialize|myocardialize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:myocardialize|myocardialize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-zh-f
|-
! Lemma
| shachazhaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazhaf|thichazhaf]] || [[word:jichazhaf|jichazhaf]] || [[word:shichazhaf|shichazhaf]] || [[word:kichazhaf|kichazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazhaf|thuthuchazhaf]] || [[word:jujuchazhaf|jujuchazhaf]] || [[word:shushuchazhaf|shushuchazhaf]] || [[word:kukuchazhaf|kukuchazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchazhaf|thuchazhaf]] || [[word:juchazhaf|juchazhaf]] || [[word:shuchazhaf|shuchazhaf]] || [[word:kuchazhaf|kuchazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchazhaf|thuchazhaf]] || [[word:juchazhaf|juchazhaf]] || [[word:shuchazhaf|shuchazhaf]] || [[word:kuchazhaf|kuchazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechazhaf|thechazhaf]] || [[word:jechazhaf|jechazhaf]] || [[word:shechazhaf|shechazhaf]] || [[word:kechazhaf|kechazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochazhaf|thothochazhaf]] || [[word:jojochazhaf|jojochazhaf]] || [[word:shoshochazhaf|shoshochazhaf]] || [[word:kokochazhaf|kokochazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochazhaf|thochazhaf]] || [[word:jochazhaf|jochazhaf]] || [[word:shochazhaf|shochazhaf]] || [[word:kochazhaf|kochazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochazhaf|thochazhaf]] || [[word:jochazhaf|jochazhaf]] || [[word:shochazhaf|shochazhaf]] || [[word:kochazhaf|kochazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchazhaf|thĂŠchazhaf]] || [[word:jĂŠchazhaf|jĂŠchazhaf]] || [[word:shĂŠchazhaf|shĂŠchazhaf]] || [[word:kĂŠchazhaf|kĂŠchazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachazhaf|thathachazhaf]] || [[word:jajachazhaf|jajachazhaf]] || [[word:shashachazhaf|shashachazhaf]] || [[word:kakachazhaf|kakachazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachazhaf|thachazhaf]] || [[word:jachazhaf|jachazhaf]] || [[word:shachazhaf|shachazhaf]] || [[word:kachazhaf|kachazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachazhaf|thachazhaf]] || [[word:jachazhaf|jachazhaf]] || [[word:shachazhaf|shachazhaf]] || [[word:kachazhaf|kachazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachazhaf|shachazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachazhaf|goshachazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachazhaf|gokishachazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachazhafnĂŒ|shachazhafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhafnknĂŒ|goshachazhafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhafnĂŒ|gokishachazhafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachazhafshĂ«|shachazhafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkshĂ«|goshachazhafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachazhafshĂ«|gokishachazhafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhafro|shachazhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkro|goshachazhafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhafro|gokishachazhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhafmu|shachazhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkmu|goshachazhafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhafmu|gokishachazhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachazhafsher|shachazhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachazhafnksher|goshachazhafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachazhafsher|gokishachazhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachazhafng|shachazhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkng|goshachazhafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachazhafng|gokishachazhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachazhafya|shachazhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkya|goshachazhafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachazhafya|gokishachazhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachazhafyam|shachazhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkyam|goshachazhafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachazhafyam|gokishachazhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhafnĂŒshĂ«|shachazhafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshachazhafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishachazhafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhafnĂŒro|shachazhafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhafnknĂŒro|goshachazhafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhafnĂŒro|gokishachazhafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhafnĂŒmu|shachazhafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhafnknĂŒmu|goshachazhafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhafnĂŒmu|gokishachazhafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhafshĂ«nĂŒ|shachazhafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachazhafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachazhafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhafshĂ«ro|shachazhafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkshĂ«ro|goshachazhafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhafshĂ«ro|gokishachazhafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhafshĂ«mu|shachazhafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkshĂ«mu|goshachazhafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhafshĂ«mu|gokishachazhafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhafronĂŒ|shachazhafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkronĂŒ|goshachazhafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhafronĂŒ|gokishachazhafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhafroshĂ«|shachazhafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkroshĂ«|goshachazhafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhafroshĂ«|gokishachazhafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhafromu|shachazhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkromu|goshachazhafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhafromu|gokishachazhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhafmunĂŒ|shachazhafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkmunĂŒ|goshachazhafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhafmunĂŒ|gokishachazhafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhafmushĂ«|shachazhafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkmushĂ«|goshachazhafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhafmushĂ«|gokishachazhafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhafmuro|shachazhafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhafnkmuro|goshachazhafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhafmuro|gokishachazhafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
